raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>5 - two charges appeared on my Barclays XXXX to XXXX. The first charge was {$630.00}, the second {$460.00}. 

I promptly reported the fraudulent charges. After an investigation, Barclays inexplicably determined charges were proper. 

I have never in my life owned a XXXX item. I have never shopped at XXXX ever. I reported this to XXXX as well. 

The person who committed the fraud somehow set up a XXXX account in my name with my email, but shipped the items to an abandoned house in XXXX. I noted this in my call to all parties. 

I would like these charges reversed as they were willing to replace my card due to the fraud but they have not reversed the charges.
